allow:
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "
import ast
files = [
    'main.py', 'schemas.py', 'core/state.py',
    'services/transcript_service.py', 'services/embedding_service.py',
    'services/retrieval_service.py', 'services/hellen_service.py',
    'utils/helpers.py',
    'routes/auth_routes.py', 'routes/learning_path_routes.py',
    'routes/analytics_routes.py', 'routes/hellen_routes.py',
]
for f in files:
    try:
        with open\(f, encoding='utf-8'\) as fh:
            ast.parse\(fh.read\(\)\)
        print\(f'OK: {f}'\)
    except SyntaxError as e:
        print\(f'SYNTAX ERROR in {f}: {e}'\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'ERROR in {f}: {e}'\)
")
